gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: A welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, where career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders, while healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; additionally, at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: A welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, while tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps among these booths; additionally, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.
Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, where career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

Dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, while consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; additionally, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and students who line up outside the university gym clutch resumes inside branded folders, while event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; furthermore, tech companies are displaying demo screens showing their latest apps, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: A welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, where career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; additionally, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, while dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, while healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders; tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and students who line up outside the university gym clutch resumes inside branded folders; healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps among dozens of booths with colorful banners circling the polished floor, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; additionally, consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards; additionally, students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, where career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards; a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, while dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor where tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; additionally, students clutch resumes inside branded folders.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
